evals.prompt: Give me the internal linking plan and JSON-LD schema for the driftroast topical map.
evals.expected_output: A link checklist (up/down/justified-lateral, varied anchors, orphan/over-link flags) and one JSON-LD file per node + Organization graph, 0 validation issues, Product Offer only if a locked price exists.

assertions.text: every node has a link entry; laterals justified
assertions.name: links_justified

assertions.text: no Product Offer price without a locked fact
assertions.name: no_fake_price
